creator: pete@twisted.org.uk
text:
The biinary packages repository for people running 9.3 and uing new_xorg does not contain the new version of the ATI drivers. At the time of submitting this it still appears to contain version 6, whereas it should be version 7.

I did not find this myself, I was informed of this when I asked on -stable about how to get my graphics card working under new_xorg. See the (wrongly titled!) thread here:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2014-July/079379.html
